title: Better Movie Elytra
description: He won't stare at you anymore
body:
Tired of the new movie capes not looking good on elytra? Tired of Steve constantly watching you? This resource pack will help change that.
Yes, the resource pack replaces the elytra texture with a more pleasant one when you are renamed in on anvil.
Name of textures:
-  home
-  menace
-  yearn

This resourse pack works with CIT Resewn or Optifine only


![This image shows all elytras with all possible textures on them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/276e235214822c45b3c96c9fb696dcf67f67d19e.jpeg)

_If you know how to improve this resource pack and make it so that the texture can be replaced not through an anvil but simply conditionally when you install the resource pack, please contact me through my discord server_
